required_columns: gene_symbol; log2fc or logFC; padj or adj.P.Val
description: Split per-comparison contrast CSVs from ProTigy/limma GCT output before UniProt mapping.

required_columns: gene identifier first column; log2fc or logFC
description: Mapped differential abundance contrast tables used as ranked inputs for GSEA and volcano/significant-protein analyses; one dataset family per mapped folder; forward is the canonical default.

required_columns: analysis_id; dataset; run_id; ontology; result_type; contrast; comparison; route_category; route_unit; condition; direction; simplified; plot_suffix; used_for_plot; input_gene_file; input_hash; config_file; config_hash; output_table; output_plot; n_genes; n_terms; empty_result; checkpoint_status; created_at
description: Formal dataset-aware contract from clusterProfiler to compareGO; compareGO must not recursively discover arbitrary enrichment CSVs.

required_columns: ID; Description; NES; p.adjust; setSize; core_enrichment
description: Plot-used GO GSEA source data selected by manifest, preserving dataset, ontology, route category, route unit, comparison and simplification state.

required_columns: ID; Description; NES; p.adjust; setSize; core_enrichment
description: Plot-used KEGG GSEA source data selected by manifest when compareGO intentionally supports KEGG.

required_columns: analysis_id; dataset; run_id; ontology; result_type; comparison; input_gene_file; output_table; input_hash; config_hash
description: Exact dataset-filtered subset of clusterProfiler outputs and mapped/log2FC files consumed by a compareGO run.

required_columns: varies by table
description: Publication/user-facing compareGO tables; source-data tables remain under results/source_data.

required_columns: Genes in input matrix; metadata sample identifiers
description: EWCE E9 canonical output set with processed/cache objects, publication figures, tables, source data and logs separated by role.

required_columns: ModuleSet; ModuleID; UniProt; GeneSymbol; Source
description: Curated overlap-derived neuropil biological programs generated from recurrent compareGO proteins and UniProt mapping; distinct from WGCNA modules.

required_columns: ModuleSet; ModuleID; ModuleColor; ProteinID; UniProt; kME; abs_kME; condition_model_fdr; strongest_condition_contrast; preservation_*
description: Reusable dataset-scoped WGCNA module-definition contract with stable color-based module IDs, GO display labels, module-level evidence, and optional DA/GSEA overlap summary; selected with PROTEOMICS_MODULE_DEFINITION_SOURCE=WGCNA.

required_columns: dataset; module_definition_source; ModuleSet; ModuleID; Sample; ModuleScore; ScoreType; n_found_in_matrix; coverage_fraction
description: Canonical source-scoped module activity outputs, including mapping trace, coverage table, run manifest, and behavior-coupling handoff tables under source_data.

required_columns: dataset; comparison; route_category; route_unit; biological_program; representative_NES; min_fdr
description: Conservative high-level biological program summary mapped from manifest-selected GO/GSEA terms.

required_columns: comparison; signature; NES; padj; left_unit; right_unit; left_region; right_region; left_condition; right_condition; contrast_class; reference_celltype_support
description: Microglia signature enrichment output with explicit contrast metadata/classification; supports conservative interpretation split by contrast class.

required_columns: signature; protein; contrast_class; direction_sign; region_pair; condition_pair; n_comparisons; min_fdr; median_nes
description: Recurrence table of leading-edge/matched proteins across significant microglia signature rows for robustness and sensitivity narratives.

required_columns: signature; comparison; contrast_class; claim_type; NES; pvalue; padj; reference_celltype_support; matched_genes
description: Conservative claims-ready subset (FDR<0.05, microglia-supported reference, and contrast class restricted to within-region condition or cross-region same-condition).

required_columns: ModuleID; ModuleColor; evidence_score; evidence_rank; condition_model_fdr; preservation_min_Zsummary
description: Publication-facing rank of WGCNA modules by convergent condition, hub, preservation, label and DA/GSEA-overlap evidence.

required_columns: edge_id; source; target; dataset; observed_r; bootstrap_median; bootstrap_ci_low; bootstrap_ci_high; fdr; stability_score; interpretation_strength
description: Edge-level bootstrap/permutation validation tables; use supported edges for figure claims and keep full edge tables exploratory.

required_columns: claim_id; dataset; evidence_type; statistic_name; statistic_value; fdr; interpretation_strength
description: Conservative cross-analysis evidence table for manuscript-ready claims and limitations.

required_columns: RDS list/object with dataset; spatial_unit; spatial_col; spatial_label_col; spatial_unit_matrix; region_layer_matrix compatibility alias
description: Dataset- and spatial-unit-scoped spatial-network object. neuron_neuropil uses region_layer; neuron_soma and microglia use region.

required_columns: varies by table
description: Network-behavior coupling outputs using canonical spatial RDS plus behavior files from data/external/behavior.

required_columns: file_path; file_type; intended_for_PRIDE; intended_for_supplement; md5; size_bytes
description: PRIDE/journal manifest for raw, processed, supplementary, method and validation files.

required_columns: script; module; inputs; outputs; provenance_artifacts; hardcoded_paths; upstream_dependencies; downstream_consumers; refactor_status; notes
description: Per-script audit used to control phased refactoring and avoid accidental broad rewrites.

required_columns: filename; biological_meaning; statistical_level; upstream_dependency; downstream_usage; intended_for_PRIDE; intended_for_supplement; transient_or_canonical
description: Layered classification of canonical, transient, PRIDE, supplement and figure-only artifacts.

required_columns: dataset; Sample; Region; Layer; RegionLayer; SpatialUnit; SpatialLabel; StressGroup; ExpGroup; Sex; Batch; marker score and n_detected columns
description: Sample-level marker and compartment annotation traits for WGCNA reporting; not purity estimates and not default covariates.

required_columns: dataset; level; module_id or supermodule_id; spatial_unit; contrast; estimate; SE; statistic; p_value; FDR_within_dataset_level; FDR_global; formula_used; dropped_covariates
description: Module and supermodule CON/RES/SUS effects by spatial unit and spatial-adjusted/global contrasts, with model diagnostics.

required_columns: dataset; ModuleID or SupermoduleID; marker fractions; GO labels; microenvironment_class or dominant_microenvironment_class; interpretation_note
description: Biological and microenvironment annotation layer for WGCNA modules/supermodules; microglia ROI labels are interpretation-only, not purity correction.

required_columns: dataset; level; contrast; estimate; p_value; FDR_global; interpretation_sentence
description: Human-readable WGCNA effect summaries; cross-dataset comparison is at broad program/supermodule-label level, not one-to-one module matching.
